name: pm-ts-starter
description: TypeScript reference extension covering all 9 SDK capability types: commands, renderers, hooks, schema, importers, search, parser, preflight, services. Demonstrates defineExtension plus registerCommand/registerFlags, registerItemFields/registerItemTypes/registerMigration, the five api.hooks.* lifecycle hooks, registerImporter/registerExporter, registerRenderer, registerSearchProvider/registerVectorStoreAdapter, registerParser, registerPreflight, and registerService - all fully typed.
author: @unbraind
